title: Zero-fee payment flow: Zelle, Venmo, and Cash App integration
body_summary: Bookkeeping layer over free P2P rails. Member selects Zelle/Venmo/Cash App, gets instructions + auto-generated reference memo, submits pending payment. Admin sees pending queue with Confirm/Reject. Schema adds status, reference_memo, confirmed_by, confirmed_at to payments table.

title: Transactional notification emails for payments, membership, and account events
body_summary: 10 React Email templates via Resend. Wire into existing server actions. Dues reminder cron job. Notification preferences column on profiles. All emails respect prefs and include manage/portal links.

title: Integrate Every.org for free online payments (ACH + card)
body_summary: Add Every.org donate widget as 4th payment option alongside Zelle/Venmo/Cash App. Webhook endpoint auto-creates confirmed payment rows. Guide donors toward free ACH. Supports recurring monthly payments.
notes: Requires treasurer approval of Every.org fiscal intermediary model before implementation can proceed.
